## How to switch between light and dark mode

1. Log in to your account and click your initials or name in the lower left corner.

2. Navigate to [Settings > Appearance](https://claude.ai/settings/appearance).

3. Select from Light, Match System, and Dark under **Color mode**.

![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/lupk8zyo/1648260417/d478c757c7115ad58a12026d4caf/AD_4nXc__Qop4X9hknWGfGj_y_DCpLutLruhxIclJIfir0ilsgNMg7X8ksIVnqk1Oce5FKlGIOYu9CKbVsu8DqD7iIY2aC0ZfXMyFTeAdNq-Cao2mXcj_WUpNF0kM2HoYR_dEx6N_cuJow?expires=1781284500&amp;signature=0fc4d785fbc6384f7de9f2bd316acfdbe9126a800557caeca6fc043bb37cdc73&amp;req=dSYjHst4nYVeXvMW1HO4zc2jJ6M%2FiI%2FhSBkgeTglJrpy2QauuhKrtEjvyBcj%0AetRsXiftUrtwAPPWovM%3D%0A)

## How to change your font

1. In [Settings > Appearance](https://claude.ai/settings/appearance), find **Chat font**.

2. Select from Default, Match System, and Dyslexic Friendly.

![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/lupk8zyo/1648260416/7fc0803d44d8de40f8e6636b2eb6/AD_4nXf0UEDa1i2QmqlQtoB5BgpQ-FfZVzss_7wMVQdvkmEDSfoTxixnG0GSxC6qrOs21HdkXH-I2Yn_GHDAf8yjd6FJtoh9FadALozvIErFp9r8LychDGLPb7OpN1CN4PRcgVAYNCre?expires=1781284500&amp;signature=aea3c64b04b87a8b4d10ab4354242b7c154e4de27627da27d0d0a458a889701b&amp;req=dSYjHst4nYVeX%2FMW1HO4zc8962HnVXU5QtNFlF5%2FHEdlCJD8doNSvr%2BdTOid%0AnXG3om0%2FkjpHUOH64F4%3D%0A)

## Can I disable the sidebar?

It's not currently possible to completely disable the sidebar. You can click the button on the top right of the sidebar to open or close it.

![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/lupk8zyo/1941108004/5217903737ddd9bb62fe5d7a904c/CleanShot+2026-01-14+at+09_12_58.png?expires=1781284500&amp;signature=373cfccaa0435f2d8e5752f061577a4cb17c7b9afe342ecdbe6bb57e4d6fa039&amp;req=dSkjF8h%2BlYFfXfMW1HO4zUS%2BB170UX%2FqylfYa7uDb9kGTPwYQi0zL6S3HD5F%0Abn12Z1YVFpKNW1LB%2Bzg%3D%0A)
